g.text: यथा शिखा मयूराणां नागानां मणयो यथा।
Yathā śikhā mayūrāṇāṁ nāgānāṁ maṇayo yathā,
"As the crest of a peacock, as the gem on the hood of a cobra —
so stands mathematics at the crown of all the Vedic sciences."
The Classical System of Mental Calculation
Mathematics was never meant to be feared. For thousands of years, the ancient
science of Vedic Mathematics gave practitioners the power to solve complex
calculations with elegance, speed, and deep understanding — not by rote, but by insight.
"GaṇitSūtram does not merely teach you to calculate faster —
it rewires how you see number, pattern, and relationship."
Structured across 15 chapters and a 30-day practice journal, this volume
traces the complete arc from fear to fluency — introducing the Base Method,
Crosswise Multiplication, Gap Logic, Sub-Base Ratio, and algebraic proofs that
illuminate the why behind every sutra.
THE SUTRAS — LAWS OF VEDIC MATHEMATICS
"By one more than the previous one"
Squaring numbers ending in 5 · Recurring decimals
Base method multiplication near powers of 10
Universal multiplication — works for all numbers
FROM THE 16 SUTRAS OF VEDIC MATHEMATICS
Sutra III — Ūrdhva-tiryagbhyām — has been implemented in VLSI chip multipliers
and DSP processors. Peer-reviewed research documents up to 52% silicon area
The mathematics in this book runs inside modern processors.
Actively used in JEE · GMAT · CAT preparation and adopted in competitive coaching
Source: IOSR Journal of VLSI & Signal Processing · IEEE peer-reviewed research
FOR STUDENTS AGED 12 AND ABOVE · NO PRIOR KNOWLEDGE REQUIRED
A software technologist with 19 years of engineering experience (2007–present), Mallah has built
enterprise-grade systems across POS, Web Applications, Distributor, ERP, Accounting
and Inventory Management. Founder of AITDLand AITDL Network
— his parallel study of Vedic algorithmsconfirmed what hardware engineers now
prove: the ancient sutrasare computationally optimal.
Tech Entrepreneur · Software Developer · Founder, AITDL, PrathamOne Press
Dedicated to making Vedic Mathematics accessible to every student,
Founded AITDL Network & PrathamOne Press to carry this ancient science forward.
PrathamOne Press · Bharat · MMXXVI · Mathematics / Vedic Methods
THE GOLDEN BOOK OF VEDIC MATHEMATICS

svg.text: VEDIC MATHEMATICS · SELF-LEARNING SERIES · VOLUME I
यत्र न क्रियते गणितं तत्र नास्ति विज्ञानम्
YATRA NA KRIYATE GAṆITAṀ TATRA NĀSTI VIJÑĀNAM
"Where mathematics is not applied, there is no science"
The Classical System of Mental Calculation
